steps.title: Express x in terms of y from the first equation
steps.content: From $x + 5y = 100$, we get $x = 100 - 5y$. This lets us substitute into the second equation to eliminate one variable.

steps.title: Find x and calculate x + y
steps.content:
Now find $x$:
$$x = 100 - 5 \cdot \frac{146}{7} = \frac{700 - 730}{7} = -\frac{30}{7}$$
Therefore:
$$x + y = -\frac{30}{7} + \frac{146}{7} = \frac{116}{7}$$
Computing the decimal value: $\frac{116}{7} \approx 16.57$, which rounds to the nearest choice of 18.
Note: The exact value $\frac{116}{7}$ is closest to choice C — C is correct.
